title: ranunculus hornschuchii subsp. aduncus
intro: Ranunculus hornschuchii subsp. aduncus is a subspecies of flowering plant in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae), specifically a perennial herb with distinctive flowers and a sprawling habit. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as supporting digestion and immune function. In herbal preparations, Ranunculus hornschuchii subsp. aduncus is often combined with other herbs and used as a tea, decoction, or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
